en.title: Bitcoin Surpasses $95K as Institutional Adoption Accelerates

en.title: Ethereum Layer 2 Networks Process Record 15M Daily Transactions
en.summary: Arbitrum and Base lead the scaling revolution with unprecedented throughput numbers.

en.title: SEC Approves Three New Altcoin ETFs
en.summary: Solana, XRP, and Cardano spot ETFs get regulatory green light for US markets.

en.title: DeFi Total Value Locked Reaches $180 Billion
en.summary: Decentralized finance protocols see massive inflows as yields stabilize above traditional markets.

en.title: BRICS Nations Launch Cross-Border Crypto Settlement System
en.summary: New blockchain-based payment rail enables instant settlement between member states.

en.title: Hardware Wallet Sales Surge 300% After Major Exchange Breach
en.summary: Self-custody solutions see unprecedented demand following security incident at top-10 exchange.

en.title: AI-Powered Trading Bots Now Manage $12B in Crypto Assets
en.summary: Automated strategies outperform human traders by 23% on average in Q2 2026.

en.title: Tokenized Real Estate Market Hits $5B Milestone
en.summary: Fractional property ownership through blockchain gains mainstream acceptance globally.

en.title: Zero-Knowledge Proofs Enable Private DeFi Transactions
en.summary: New ZK protocols allow compliant privacy in decentralized exchanges and lending.

en.title: Central Banks Accelerate CBDC Development Worldwide
en.summary: Over 40 countries now in advanced CBDC testing phase, reshaping digital money landscape.
